NOTES: OpenLane 2.3.10 was installed (pip install openlane==2.3.10) but aborted at GenerateJsonHeader because yosys 0.33 does not implement the -y Python-scripting flag required by OpenLane 2. Synthesis was run directly with yosys 0.33 + abc + sky130_fd_sc_hd TT 25C 1.8V liberty, producing equivalent cell-level results. Full OpenLane 2 requires yosys >= 0.36 built with Python support.
